hits.title: Saudi Arabia–United Arab Emirates border - Wikipedia
hits.summary:
The **Saudi Arabia–United Arab Emirates border** is 457 km (284 mi) in length and runs from the Persian Gulf coast in the west to the tripoint with Oman in the east.

hits.summary: It then changes direction eastward, ending at the Saudi border with the United Arab Emirates at al-Batha Border Crossing.

hits.title: Al-Batha Port - Saudipedia
hits.summary:
**Al-Batha Port** is a land port on the eastern border of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and the only port to connect the Kingdom with the United Arab Emirates.
It is located in al-Udayd Governorate in the Eastern Province, near the border strip with the United Arab Emirates, which is about 682 km long.
